changes: Day 36 update: UK-led 40+ nation coalition (expanded from initial 35) demands 'immediate and unconditional' Hormuz reopening with sanctions threat and military planners meeting next week. Iran demands guaranteed ceasefire but calls US demands 'maximalist and irrational'. IEA warns April oil supply losses will be 'twice March' — world losing 4.5-5 mb/d, doubling mid-April. Kpler: 214 crossings Mar 1-Apr 1 (94% decline). Brent volatile $105-112. Rubio: war objectives in 'weeks not months'. Apr 6 deadline 3 days away. OPEC+ Apr 5 critical. No new FM declarations or infrastructure attacks found for Apr 3.
newEvents: UK Hormuz summit Apr 2: expanded to 40+ nations; chairman's statement demands immediate reopening; sanctions threat; military planners next week; Cooper: Iran 'hijacking shipping route'; US excluded — Al Jazeera, Euronews, Military.com
IEA Birol: April supply losses will be 'twice March'; weighing second coordinated release daily/hourly; jet fuel/diesel shortages reaching Europe Apr/May — CNBC
Iran demands guaranteed ceasefire via intermediaries; calls US demands 'maximalist and irrational'; no direct talks confirmed — CNBC/Reuters
Kpler transit data: 214 commodity crossings Mar 1-Apr 1 (94% decline); 131 oil/gas tankers; 60% Iran-linked — Kpler, Anadolu Agency
World losing 4.5-5 mb/d through ~Apr 19; doubling to largest crude supply loss in history — CNBC, Wikipedia/Economic Impact
Brent volatile $105-112 range; US gas past $4/gal for first time since 2022 — Fortune, CNBC
Rubio: war objectives achievable in 'weeks not months' without ground troops — France 24, Irish Times
Casualty toll: 3,000+ killed across region, 1,900+ in Iran, 1,200+ in Lebanon, 19 in Israel, 13 US service members — Wikipedia, CNN, NPR
noNewFmReason: No new FM declarations found for April 2-3. All 28 existing FMs remain active. Lotte Chemical Yeosu restart confirmed for May 29 (pre-existing). YNCC-Lotte merger review underway.

keyRisks: APR 6 DEADLINE (3 DAYS): Trump deadline to reopen Hormuz or escalate to power plants, desalination, Kharg Island
OPEC+ APR 5 (2 DAYS): Most consequential meeting since formation — stick with 206 kb/d increase or reverse?
IEA SECOND RELEASE: Birol assessing daily/hourly if second coordinated release needed; jet fuel/diesel shortages hitting Asia, reaching Europe Apr-May
SUPPLY DOUBLING: 4.5-5 mb/d loss doubling by mid-April — largest crude supply disruption in history
DIPLOMACY STALLED: Iran demands guaranteed ceasefire; Kharazi (mediation lead) injured Apr 1; no direct US-Iran talks
DUAL CHOKEPOINT: Houthi Bab al-Mandeb closure threat + Hormuz = near-total ME export blockade
PETROCHEMICAL CASCADE: Naphtha past $1,000/mt; cracker shutdowns cascading across Asia and Europe
